title: echinochloa crus-galli subsp. erecta
intro: Echinochloa crus-galli subsp. erecta, also known as barnyard grass, is a type of invasive grass species that can be found in various parts of the world. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of barnyard grass include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting the immune system. The plant is often prepared as a tea or infusion, and can also be used in herbal remedies in the form of capsules or tinctures.
